results.justification: EXACT TWIN at the co-evolution layer — adversarial attack-defense co-evolution IS the per-quadrant defender training loop of KULTRUN-QUAD-DEFENSE; quadrant stratification is small extension.
Baseline-defense bouquet of distinct defenders per attack-type IS the per-quadrant specialist paradigm.
Defender progressively improving against dynamic adversarial examples covers the per-quadrant co-evolution training.
Attack-type taxonomy + per-category defense IS the axis-partitioned attack-type defender paradigm.
MoE routing-attack analysis covers the meta-classifier routing vulnerability of KULTRUN-QUAD-DEFENSE.
Per-expert (quadrant-specialist analog) poisoning attack with MoE-routing-specific defense covers per-quadrant specialist paradigm.
F-SOUR discovers per-route unsafe configurations; quadrant-routing vulnerability directly addressed.
Adaptive attacks bypass stratified defenses with ASR>90% — direct evidence the quadrant-stratified defense paradigm is well-explored and breakable.
